channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to restrict birthright citizenship
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
- US Supreme Court spurns Trump on birthright citizenship, allows transgender sports bans
- Supreme Court reminds America (and Trump) what citizenship is
- Supreme Court reminds America (and Trump) what citizenship is
- US Supreme Court rejects Trump's effort to limit birthright citizenship
- U.S. Supreme Court rejects Trump's order of limiting birthright citizenship
- Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s birthright citizenship order
- Americans react to Supreme Court upholding birthright citizenship
- US Supreme Court rejects Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
- Supreme Court Upholds Birthright Citizenship, Blow To Trump
- Supreme Court reminds America (and Trump) what citizenship is
- Supreme Court strikes down Trump's executive order restricting birthright citizenship
- Angry Trump lambasts Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship decision, urges Congress to act: ‘too bad for our Country’
- US Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s executive order limiting birthright citizenship
- Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits
- US Supreme Court Rejects Trump Bid To Restrict Birthright Citizenship
- US top court backs birthright citizenship in rebuke to Trump
- US supreme court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump agenda
- SCOTUS rules against Trump’s order limiting birthright citizenship
- US Supreme Court rules against Trump order to end birthright citizenship
- U.S. Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, rejecting Trump’s proposed limits
- Supreme Court's birthright ruling is major blow to Trump
- Supreme Court keeps birthright citizenship, overruling Trump order
- US Supreme Court strikes down Trump birthright citizenship order
- US Supreme Court rejects Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
- US Supreme Court blocks Trump's bid to end birthright citizenship
- US birthright citizenship: 5 things to know as SC blocks Trump's controversial order in major ruling
- US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in a blow to Trump
- Supreme Court Rules Against Trump In Birthright Citizenship Case
- Supreme Court Upholds Birthright Citizenship, Ruling Trump Order Unconstitutional
- Supreme Court spurns Trump on birthright citizenship, allows transgender sports bans
- US Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to restrict birthright citizenship
- Supreme Court to rule on Trump bid to limit birthright citizenship: Key thing to know]]>

- Supreme Court upholds state laws banning transgender girls and women from school athletic teams
- US supreme court rules states can exclude trans athletes from female sports
- US Supreme Court upholds state bans on transgender student athletes
- US Supreme Court upholds state laws banning transgender girls and women from school athletic teams
- US Supreme Court upholds state bans on transgender student athletes
- Supreme Court Upholds State Bans on Transgender Athletes
- US Supreme Court clears way for states to ban transgender student athletes]]>

- At least 14 children killed after roof of Pakistan tuition centre collapses
- Pakistan tutoring centre roof collapses, killing 14 children
- Roof of tutoring center collapses in eastern Pakistan, killing at least 14 children, police say
- Roof of coaching academy in Pakistan collapses, killing 14 children
- Roof of tutoring center collapses in eastern Pakistan, killing at least 14 children, police say
- Roof collapse kills 14 children at Pakistan tuition centre
- 14 children killed, 20 injured as roof of private tuition centre collapses in Lahore
- Roof of tutoring center collapses in eastern Pakistan, killing at least 14 children, police say
- Urgent: 14 children killed as building roof collapses in Pakistan's Lahore
- Flash: 14 children killed as tuition center roof collapses in Pakistan's Lahore

- 14 children killed in Pakistan tutoring centre roof collapse]]>
